CustomField.description: Human-readable text stamped onto Case.Routing_Reason__c when a Case lands in this queue. Editable in Setup so admins can re-word the audit trail without an Apex deploy. Capped at 255 to match Case.Routing_Reason__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Audit-trail text written to Case.Routing_Reason__c for this queue.
CustomField.label: Reason
